meaning: n.西里伯斯岛(印尼苏拉威西岛之旧称)
examples: Here's what they found, as illustrated by a few of our favorite social media loving Celebes.
A 7.5 magnitude quake hit the Celebes Sea early Monday north of Indonesia's Sulawesi island.
